title: Summarise a paper
tagline: Structured per-section summaries — background, methods, findings, limitations — anchored to verifiable page-cited quotes
description: Reads each PDF and emits a four-section academic summary (background / methods / findings / limitations) with verbatim evidence snippets pinned to PDF pages, so every claim is click-to-verifiable in the result viewer.
task_description: Produce a structured per-section summary of each paper, with verbatim page-anchored evidence supporting every section.
context: Empirical or review papers.  Multi-study papers should yield one summary per study; single-study papers yield exactly one summary.
